mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_API (API_CODE, API_NAME, API_PATH, HTTP_METHOD, STATUS) VALUES (#{apiCode}, #{apiName}, #{apiPath}, #{httpMethod}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT API_ID, API_CODE, API_NAME, API_PATH, HTTP_METHOD, STATUS FROM SYS_API WHERE API_CODE = #{apiCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT a.API_CODE FROM SYS_API a INNER JOIN SYS_ROLE_API_PERMISSION rap ON rap.API_ID = a.API_ID INNER JOIN SYS_USER_ROLE ur ON ur.ROLE_ID = rap.ROLE_ID WHERE ur.USER_ID = #{userId} AND a.STATUS = 1
